docs.title: introduction, timeline, equippment
docs.text:
• QR - 9 month
  • report every 3 months
  • the final paper should include 2000+ references

    5 papers per week - Manolya's suggestion conclude who did what in the area, methodology, what they find/expect to find

docs.title: discuss what to be included in systematic literature review, explore options
docs.text:
• risk perception ? anxiety
  • automated cars in general ? shuttle specifically
  • unified models
  • ways to link anxiety/.. with established models
  • industry report ? academic conference paper

docs.title: Month 1 activities
docs.text: Activity Description Training 3-day mandatory training; research integrity, etc. 24 hours in total Lab Visit ALIVE, VR Cave, Design Factory MKCC Project help create forms; review 2018 report PGR Forms Learning Agreement Form; Development Needs Analysis Form Refine objectives and 1st year plan Research Understand key concepts Systematic literature review 1-1 Meeting Had 5 one-on-one meetings

docs.title: technology
docs.text: how they work, issues, industry

docs.title: acceptence
docs.text:
• psychological issues > technological issues

it is the psychological issues rather than the technological ones that led to the obstacles to the large-scale adoption (Sjöberg, 2002; Xu et al., 2018) Tan et al, 2022

  • population heterogeneity- gender, age, mobile behavioural characteristics, income
  • behavioural theories / models - trust, perceived risk/benefit, attitude, perceived ease of use/usefulness, social norm, compatibility
  • dynamic
